Table of XII
Business Club

An Exclusive International Leadership Circle for Visionaries Without Borders

Where leaders from different countries gather to solve challenges, exchange wisdom and multiply through trusted collaboration.

The Table of XII is a private 12-seat leadership destination where executives, entrepreneurs and founders connect across borders, learn new strategies, align with timeless principles and support one another in building businesses that grow with purpose.

Reserve Your Seat
Only 12 seats per table to preserve a personal experience.
The Reality of Leadership

The higher you rise,
the greater the responsibility.

Business growth, people management, financial decisions, leadership challenges and performance expectations can become overwhelming. Many leaders carry these burdens silently.

The Table of XII Business Club provides a trusted international environment where leaders can connect across countries, learn new strategies, collaborate with purpose, solve real problems and grow together.

The Four Pillars
Support

Trusted support inside a focused circle where leaders can be seen, heard and strengthened.

Strategy

Fresh insight and practical strategies to help you navigate growth, decisions and new opportunities.

Leadership

Personal, professional and purpose-led growth that strengthens influence and direction.

Solutions

Cross-border relationships, trusted expertise and collaborative problem solving around the table.

Who Should Join?

Executives • Entrepreneurs • Founders • Business Owners • CEOs • Managing Directors • Senior Executives • Consultants • Professional Service Providers • Emerging Leaders • Decision Makers • Global Visionaries

A Personal Invitation

Dr. Madelaine Gomes MSc.D.

Speaker | Author | Executive Business Mentor | Spiritual Coach

Dr. Madelaine Gomes brings together years of experience in business, leadership, human development and personal transformation.

  • Former Director across HR, Staff Solutions and Business Development
  • Experienced in leading complex teams and advising business leaders
  • Business and leadership advisor for the Harvard Publication Board
  • Dr. Metaphysical Science, mindset teacher and pranic healer
  • Expert in human behaviour with years of experience in human development
  • Creator of Table for XII and the I AM POSSIBLE breakthrough programs
  • Speaker and author

Throughout my work with business leaders and executives, I have seen a common challenge. Many successful people are carrying immense responsibility while quietly navigating pressure, uncertainty and isolation.

The Table of XII Business Club was created as an international leadership circle where leaders can receive support, build meaningful relationships, access practical solutions and continue growing personally, professionally and purposefully beyond borders.

My vision is to create a trusted circle where leaders from different countries are strengthened, businesses are supported, wisdom is exchanged and leadership is elevated beyond borders.

You do not need to carry the weight alone.

Reserve Your Seat

Reserve your seat at the Table of Excellence.

Help shape the future of the Table of XII Business Club while gaining early access to an international circle of leaders, resources, strategic conversations and opportunities designed to grow beyond borders.

Each table is limited to 12 seats to preserve an intimate, high-trust leadership experience.

International Table Time

Online Table sessions begin at 5:00 PM SAST to support leaders across South Africa, the UK, Dubai and the USA. A 10:00 AM SAST table will be introduced as the circle expands.

Founding Member Rate

Meetings take place every second Thursday.

Reserve Your Seat

Your seat reservation secures early access to the founding membership experience. After reserving your seat, you will receive direct communication with the next steps.

Or WhatsApp directly: +27 82 880 0227

Great Leaders Do Not Succeed Alone

Join an international leadership circle committed to clarity, collaboration, business growth and meaningful impact. Each table is limited to 12 seats for a personal, focused and high-trust experience.

Reserve Your Seat

After payment, you will receive direct communication with your founding membership next steps. The founding international table begins at 5:00 PM SAST. The current Founding Member rate is available for the first month of the founding stage only, after which new members will join at R9,000 per month.

© 2026 · Table of XII Business Club
POPI Act Compliance

In accordance with the Protection of Personal Information Act 4 of 2013 (POPIA), all personal information submitted through this website is collected for the sole purpose of processing your membership reservation and communicating Club-related information.

Your information will not be sold, shared, or disclosed to any third party without your explicit consent. You have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal information at any time by contacting us at spiritscience@madelainegomes.com.

Disclaimer

The Table of XII Business Club, facilitated by Dr. Madelaine Gomes MSc.D., is designed for educational, strategic, leadership and personal development purposes. Results may vary based on individual circumstances and application.

Nothing shared through the Club constitutes legal, financial, medical or psychological advice. Members are encouraged to seek qualified professional counsel for matters specific to their individual situation.

Terms & Conditions

All membership fees are payable in advance. Payments made for membership reservations, founding member access, monthly membership or table participation are non-refundable.

Members are welcome to leave the Table at any time. To avoid future billing, members should communicate their intention to leave before the next membership fee becomes due.
